TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Alan Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Alan Anderson, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Alan Anderson mqwas biru sa Thomas Edison pqwsan biru seneng, Minneapolis, Minnesota, U.S. Alan Anderson mqwas biru sa DeLaSalle pqwsan biru seneng, Minneapolis, Minnesota, U.S. Alan Anderson, t'aring kawas tay 2001 tehuk kawas tay 2005, mqwas biru sa Michigan State pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Alan Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: alan an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, alan an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja alan an*ers~ɕon mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa tħomas~ɕ e*is~ɕon pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, minneapolis~ɕ, minnes~ɕota, u.s~ɕ. alan an*ers~ɕon mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *elas~ɕalle pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, minneapolis~ɕ, minnes~ɕota, u.s~ɕ. alan an*ers~ɕon, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa miʦ~ʨħiɣan s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja alan an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Alan Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1982, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Alan Anderson, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Alan Anderson mqwas biru sa Thomas Edison pqwsan biru seneng, Minneapolis, Minnesota, U.S. Alan Anderson mqwas biru sa DeLaSalle pqwsan biru seneng, Minneapolis, Minnesota, U.S. Alan Anderson, t'aring kawas tay 2001 tehuk kawas tay 2005, mqwas biru sa Michigan State pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Alan Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. maki sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: alan an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, alan an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja alan an*ers~ɕon mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa tħomas~ɕ e*is~ɕon pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, minneapolis~ɕ, minnes~ɕota, u.s~ɕ. alan an*ers~ɕon mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *elas~ɕalle pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ, minneapolis~ɕ, minnes~ɕota, u.s~ɕ. alan an*ers~ɕon, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa miʦ~ʨħiɣan s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja alan an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
